pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which copies the data to this path.
Explicitly defined in the task description instructions. Target values correspond to real 2023/2024 population estimates from sources like the US Census Bureau and Australian Bureau of Statistics.
Matches verifier.py logic that enforces abs(actual - target) <= tolerance.
Verified using dbfread on the original ne_110m_admin_0_countries.dbf dataset.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Natural Earth map data. Verified that 'NAME' and 'POP_EST' are valid DBF fields for country names and population estimates. The expected population values accurately match the prompt instructions and align with real-world demographic estimates for 2023-2024. The output path was verified to correctly match the gvSIG environment setup directories.
